build_sentence.hint_zh: （點餐時）表示自己還需要幾分鐘才能決定。

build_sentence.context: Do you know where the library is?
build_sentence.answer: It's right behind the science building
build_sentence.hint_zh: 告訴對方圖書館就在科學館後面。

build_sentence.context: I just finished my last exam.
build_sentence.answer: How do you think it went
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方覺得這場考試考得怎麼樣。

build_sentence.context: Should we meet before the study group?
build_sentence.answer: Let's meet outside the coffee shop instead
build_sentence.hint_zh: 提議改約在咖啡店外面碰面。

build_sentence.context: Why weren't you in class today?
build_sentence.answer: I woke up with a bad cold
build_sentence.hint_zh: 說明自己起床時得了重感冒。

build_sentence.context: I'm thinking about dropping the economics course.
build_sentence.answer: Have you talked to your advisor about it
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方有沒有先跟指導教授談過這件事。

build_sentence.context: The professor moved the deadline to Friday.
build_sentence.answer: That takes a lot of pressure off me
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示這（延後）幫自己減輕了不少壓力。

build_sentence.context: Did you hear the campus shuttle is free now?
build_sentence.answer: That will save a lot of students some money
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示這會幫很多學生省下不少錢。

build_sentence.context: I'm having trouble understanding the reading assignment.
build_sentence.answer: Should we try going through it together after class
build_sentence.hint_zh: 提議下課後一起把這篇讀物弄懂。

build_sentence.context: I can't decide which elective to take next semester.
build_sentence.answer: You should pick the one that works with your schedule
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議選能配合自己時間的那一門。

build_sentence.context: The library is completely packed during finals week.
build_sentence.answer: That's exactly why I reserve a study room ahead of time
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示所以自己才會提前預約自習室。

build_sentence.context: I've been feeling overwhelmed with all my coursework lately.
build_sentence.answer: Have you thought about talking to someone at the counseling center
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方有沒有想過去諮商中心找人聊聊。

build_sentence.context: I'm not sure I can finish this project by tomorrow.
build_sentence.answer: You could ask the professor to give you a couple more days
build_sentence.hint_zh: 建議去請教授多給自己幾天時間。

build_sentence.context: I heard the biology midterm is going to be really difficult.
build_sentence.answer: That's exactly why I've been reviewing my notes for the past two weeks
build_sentence.hint_zh: 表示所以自己這兩週一直在複習筆記。

build_sentence.context: I completely forgot to sign up for the campus tour.
build_sentence.answer: Do you think there are any spots left for the tour this weekend
build_sentence.hint_zh: 問對方覺得這週末的導覽還有沒有名額。

build_sentence.context: I still don't understand how to cite sources in this format.
build_sentence.answer: The writing center offers free workshops that can walk you through the whole process
build_sentence.hint_zh: 告訴對方寫作中心有免費工作坊，能帶你走過整個流程。

lnr_sets.title: 校園行政（註冊與選課）
sentences: I need to update my address.
You have to fill out this form first.
I want to add a couple of new classes.
Could you tell me when the add-drop deadline is this term?
You're going to need to get your advisor's signature on this form.
If you miss the deadline, you will have to pay a late fee.
I could have submitted everything on time if I had known about the new deadline.

lnr_sets.title: 課堂學術（討論與作業）
sentences: Let's look at the next chapter.
I want to focus on the main idea.
Most of the students seem to struggle with this concept.
You are going to write a short response paper for tomorrow.
We could have covered a couple of these topics a lot sooner.
The results of the experiment did not really match what we had expected.
If you want to do well on the exam, you have to review all of the readings.

lnr_sets.title: 日常生活（購物與雜事）
sentences: I have to run some errands.
Do you want to come along with me?
I need to pick up a couple of things.
We are going to stop by the store on the way.
Most of the shops downtown are going to close early on Sunday.
I could have saved some money if I had brought a coupon along.
If we want to avoid the crowds, we should try to get there before noon.

lnr_sets.title: 社交活動（聚會與邀約）
sentences: We are going to a party.
Do you want to join us later tonight?
A couple of my friends are coming over too.
We are going to meet up at the coffee shop first.
Most of the group wants to go see the new movie downtown.
You could have come with us if you had finished a little earlier.
If you want to come, we are going to leave around eight after we grab dinner.
